# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Write a Deployment Manager template for GCE firewall rules. Create rules that allow SSH (port 22), RDP (port 3389), HTTP (port 80), and HTTPS (port 443) from any source IP (0.0.0.0/0). Our development team needs global access to test instances.
# Category: cloud_network_security

resources:
  FirewallRule1:
    type: gcp-types compute-v1:firewalls
    properties:
      name: ssh-from-anywhere
      network: ${project.name}
      allow:
        - tcp:22
      sourceRanges:
        - 0.0.0.0/0

  FirewallRule2:
    type: gcp-types compute-v1:firewalls
    properties:
      name: rdp-from-anywhere
      network: ${project.name}
      allow:
        - tcp:3389
      sourceRanges:
        - 0.0.0.0/0

  FirewallRule3:
    type: gcp-types compute-v1:firewalls
    properties:
      name: http-from-anywhere
      network: ${project.name}
      allow:
        - tcp:80
      sourceRanges:
        - 0.0.0.0/0

  FirewallRule4:
    type: gcp-types compute-v1:firewalls
    properties:
      name: https-from-anywhere
      network: ${project.name}
      allow:
        - tcp:443
      sourceRanges:
        - 0.0.0.0/0
